title: ammocharis coranica
intro: Ammocharis coranica, also known as the African corn lily, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ammocharis coranica include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as acting as an antiseptic and astringent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, and its roots are used in traditional African medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
